title: Hollis (disambiguation)
content:
'''Hollis''' can refer to:

==[[In-universe]]==
===[[Canon]]===
*'''[[Lutin Hollis]]''', a member of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces]]
*'''[[Reyé Hollis]]''', a [[sergeant]] in the [[Rebel Alliance Special Forces]]

[[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]]

===[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]===
*'''[[Hollis]]''', a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]
*'''[[Lutin Hollis/Legends|Lutin Hollis]]''', a member of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]
*'''[[Reyé Hollis/Legends|Reyé Hollis]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] and son of Lutin Hollis
*The '''[[Hollis-series steward droid]]''', a model of [[Service droid/Legends|service droid]]
*The [[Fair Hollis system/Legends|'''Fair Hollis system''']], a [[Karthakk sector/Legends|Karthakk sector]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]]

==Real world==
*'''[[John Hollis]]''', the actor who portrayed [[Lobot]] in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]

{{Disambig}}
